summary: A small pipe bomb exploded near a government building in central London causing minor injuries.
Armed insurgents ambushed a police patrol vehicle in New Delhi resulting in two officers killed.
Rebels hijacked a commercial truck and kidnapped the driver for ransom near Bogota.
Militants attacked a military checkpoint on the outskirts of Nairobi.
A suicide bomber detonated an explosive vest inside a local marketplace in Manila.
Arsonists targeted a place of worship in Paris during late hours.
An improvised explosive device targeted an army convoy in central Baghdad.
Gunmen opened fire on a government convoy traveling through Kabul.
A suicide car bomb exploded near the entrance of Mogadishu international airport.
Assailants shot at school teachers returning home in Yala province.
